title: [B&B]BlueArchiveHalosAndBatteryShield
description: This data pack was created by Azusa. It modifies the equipment that can be shielded in the BatteryShield module (from chest armor to netherite helmet). It is recommended to use it with the BlueArchiveHalos module.
body:
#  What's this for?
It modifies the equipment that can be shielded in the [BatteryShield](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/battery-shield) 
(from chest armor to netherite helmet).
# How dose this work?
[BatteryShield](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/battery-shield) uses the tag _forge:armors/chestplates_ to identify chestplates that can use shield cores

# Advice
It is recommended to use it with the [BlueArchiveHalos](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/blue-archive-halos) .
